headline: Rockwell Medical Advances Quality and Regulatory Leadership
summary: WIXOM, Mich., July 22, 2026--Brian Cox joins Rockwell Medical as VP, Quality and Regulatory Compliance, bringing more than 20 years' healthcare experience to the Company.
